prompt: Photorealistic wide-angle smartphone photo inside a high-end private karaoke lounge or luxury club hallway at night. Low-light environment, warm yellow wall lamps and ceiling spotlights, black marble walls, mirror reflections, metallic decorations, with a dark fabric sofa partially obscuring the foreground. A row of seven adult East Asian women are standing, appearing as a natural snapshot while waiting in a lounge area. They are wearing elegant evening gowns, primarily in black, champagne, gold, and silver, with materials like satin, sequins, and velvet. Each person has a slightly different pose, natural and restrained expressions, mostly not looking at the camera. Real smartphone wide-angle lens, 24mm equivalent focal length, landscape orientation, slight wide-angle perspective distortion at the edges, off-center composition with some clipping on the right, candid snapshot feel. Darker atmosphere, conservative exposure, heavy shadows, warm ambient light, slight noise, high ISO texture, authentic social media original photo feel, not studio-shot, not over-edited.
